# Lumber Order — Hill Country Lumber

## Supplier

- **Company**: Hill Country Lumber Co.
- **Location**: 8901 Ranch Road 620, Austin, TX 78726
- **Sales Rep**: Danny Ortega
- **Phone**: (512) 555-0391
- **Account Number**: HCL-2026-0447

## Order Summary

Order placed March 1, 2026 for structural framing package. All lumber is kiln-dried Douglas Fir, graded #2 or better per WWPA standards.

### Framing Package

| Item | Qty | Unit Price | Total |
|------|-----|-----------|-------|
| 2x6x16 Douglas Fir (walls) | 480 | $12.50 | $6,000 |
| 2x10x20 Douglas Fir (floor joists) | 220 | $24.00 | $5,280 |
| 2x12x16 Douglas Fir (headers) | 48 | $28.00 | $1,344 |
| 4x4x8 PT pine (posts) | 24 | $14.00 | $336 |
| 3/4" AdvanTech subfloor (4x8 sheets) | 85 | $52.00 | $4,420 |
| 7/16" OSB sheathing (4x8 sheets) | 120 | $18.50 | $2,220 |
| LVL beams 1-3/4x11-7/8x20 | 6 | $185.00 | $1,110 |
| Simpson Strong-Tie hardware (assorted) | 1 lot | $1,800 | $1,800 |

**Subtotal**: $22,510
**Bulk Discount (8%)**: -$1,800.80
**Delivery Fee**: $450
**Total**: $21,159.20

## Delivery Schedule

- **First delivery**: March 10, 2026 — floor joists, subfloor, LVL beams (foundation must be cured)
- **Second delivery**: March 24, 2026 — wall framing lumber, sheathing, hardware
- Danny confirmed the yard has sufficient Douglas Fir inventory through April. He recommended we place any change orders by March 15 to lock in current pricing, as he expects a 5-7% price increase in Q2 due to tariffs on Canadian softwood.
